title: splitnets -ports doesn't update module instantiations
body:
When I run `splitnets -ports`, I expect that the design will still function as before..  However I was finding that modules were still being instantiated using their old ports, rather than the new split versions.

I was finding this on combinatorial_aes https://github.com/jeremysalwen/combinatorial_aes
With the following commands

```
read_verilog rtl/aes_128.v rtl/round.v rtl/table.v
synth -top aes_128
splitnets -ports
hierarchy -check
```

ERROR: Module `expand_key_128' referenced in module`aes_128' in cell `a1' does not have a port named 'in'.
